name: 04_master_orchestrator
description: Master daily batch pipeline. Execution order: Bronze → Silver → Occupancy → Gold KPI + Anomaly + Recommendation → Consumption Forecast. Occupancy failure is non-blocking (Gold uses neutral 0.5 fallback). Schedule: daily at 02:00 UTC (04:00 Berlin / 05:00 Istanbul).

_architecture_notes.trial_vs_production: Trial: sequential stages to avoid TooManyRequestsForCapacity (430). Production: Occupancy + KPI run in parallel (Gold Wave 1), then Forecast + Anomaly + Recommendation run in parallel (Gold Wave 2).
_architecture_notes.occupancy_dependency: Occupancy (08) depends on Silver. Gold KPI (03) depends on Silver. Forecast (07) depends on Gold KPI + Occupancy. Anomaly (anomaly_detection) depends on Gold KPI.
_architecture_notes.soft_fail_pattern: Stage_3_Occupancy failure is soft — Stage_4_Gold runs regardless via ['Succeeded','Failed'] dependency. Forecast notebook has built-in fallback (nötr 0.5) when gold_occupancy_profile is missing.

activities.name: Stage_1_Bronze
activities.description: Run bronze ingestion pipeline: 00_reference_data_loader + 01_bronze_ingestion in parallel. Watermark-based incremental load — only new records since last run.

activities.name: On_Bronze_Failure
activities.description: Hard fail — Bronze failed means no new data. Silver and Gold cannot run on stale data.

typeProperties.message: Bronze ingestion failed. Master pipeline aborted. Check 01_bronze_batch_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: Stage_2_Silver
activities.description: Run silver transformation: 02_silver_transformation. Cleans, validates, de-duplicates bronze data. Produces silver_energy_readings + silver_building_master.

activities.name: On_Silver_Failure
activities.description: Hard fail — Silver failed means Gold analytics will run on stale or invalid data.

typeProperties.message: Silver transformation failed. Master pipeline aborted. Check 02_silver_transform_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: Stage_3_Occupancy
activities.description: Run 08_occupancy_prediction: generates gold_occupancy_profile (hourly occupancy probability per building × 7 days × 24 hours). SOFT DEPENDENCY — Gold KPI runs regardless of this stage's outcome. Forecast uses neutral 0.5 fallback if occupancy is unavailable.

activities.name: Stage_4_Gold_KPI_Anomaly
activities.description: Run gold analytics: 03_gold_kpi_engine (daily KPIs per building) + anomaly_detection + recommendation_engine. Runs regardless of occupancy outcome (Succeeded OR Failed dependency on Stage_3_Occupancy).
activities._note: dependencyConditions includes 'Failed' to implement soft-fail: if occupancy notebook errors or finds no silver data, Gold KPI still runs. Gold KPI does not need occupancy data.

activities.name: On_Gold_KPI_Failure
activities.description: Hard fail — KPI engine failed means Forecast has no gold_kpi_daily to train on. Power BI reports should not refresh on incomplete data.

typeProperties.message: Gold KPI/Anomaly/Recommendation pipeline failed. Forecast stage skipped. Check 03_gold_analytics_pipeline run logs.

activities.name: Stage_5_Forecast
activities.description: Run 07_consumption_forecast: 7-day Prophet forecast per building. Uses gold_kpi_daily (HDD/CDD regressors) + gold_occupancy_profile (occupancy regressor, if available). Runs after Gold KPI to ensure gold_kpi_daily exists.

activities.name: On_Forecast_Warning
activities.description: Soft warning only — Forecast failure does not abort the pipeline. Power BI shows last available forecast. Alert should be sent but pipeline is considered partially successful.
activities._note: In production: replace with WebActivity to call alerting webhook. Do not use Fail activity — stale forecasts are acceptable, missing KPIs are not.

activities.name: Pipeline_Success_Log
activities.description: All critical stages completed successfully. Power BI Direct Lake will reflect new data on next report open/refresh.

triggers.name: DailySchedule_0200_UTC
triggers.description: Runs every day at 02:00 UTC — 04:00 Berlin / 05:00 Istanbul. Chosen to complete before business hours (08:00) and avoid daytime Fabric Trial capacity contention. Typical run time: 25-40 minutes for 3-10 buildings.
